tickets.label: aggregate
tickets.title: Realized annualized fee rate deviates from claimed 0.66%
tickets.note: Formula: observed = fees_derived_90d_annualized / lazy_tvl_window_avg_usd, where fees_derived_90d_annualized = fees_derived_90d * (365 / days_in_window). Window: 2025-11-30 to 2026-02-27 (90 fee days, 90 TVL points).

tickets.title: Forum treasury transfer vs on-chain routed amount

tickets.label: SIP3.13.1
tickets.title: Forum treasury transfer vs on-chain USDC routed into LVUSDC path
tickets.note: Observed value uses treasury->LVUSDC USDC transfer in execute transaction.

tickets.label: SIP3.13
tickets.title: Same-token prior funding overlap limits campaign attribution confidence
tickets.note: Prior same-token funding creates attribution overlap in Claimed-event windows.
